title: mentha × dumetorum var. hispidula
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. hispidula, also known as a variety of wild mint, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, headaches, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Mentha × dumetorum var. hispidula include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, improve digestion, and reduce stress levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
